Application For Default Judgment By Plaintiff The Fortress Law Firm, Inc. Against Defendants Rock Clapper, Scanx, Inc., Ngb Markets, Inc., William Scott Lawley, And Richard Kaiser Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 585(B)
Off Calendar Oct-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Default Judgment hearing against Defendants Rock Clapper, NGB Markets, Inc., ScanX Inc., William Scott Lawley and Richard Kaiser.

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:38:10 a.m., pausing at 9:49:01 a.m., reconvening at 9:49:46 a.m. and concluding at 9:55:52 a.m.(D505)

David P. Nemecek, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of the Fortress Law Firm
Defendants Rock Clapper, NGB Markets, Inc., ScanX Inc., William Scott Lawley and Richard Kaiser not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for Contract/Warranty filed February 4, 2022.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Rock Clapper on March 23, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant ScanX Inc. on March 23, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant NGB Markets, Inc. on March 23, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendants Rock Clapper, NGB Markets, Inc., ScanX, Inc. on May 4, 2023.
Proof of service by mail and acknowledgement receipt as to Defendant William Scott Lawley on April 13, 2023; effectuated on April 24, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant William Scott Lawley on July 1, 2023.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Richard Kaiser on July 21, 2023; effectuated on July 31, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Defendants Does 1-20 on August 15, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Richard Kaiser on September 16, 2023.
Notice of hearing on application of Default judgment served by Mail as to Defendants on September 7, 2023; effectuated on September 18, 2023.

Counsel for the Plaintiff summarizes the matter and offers proof to the Court.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s to the Court for review:

Exhibit H: Email to the Defendants dated September 7, 2023
Exhibit I: Spreadsheet of updated calculation owed by Defendant Clapper, Kaiser, Lawley and NGB Markets.
Exhibit J: Spreadsheet of current amount owed by Defendant Clapper and ScanX.
Exhibit K: Spreadsheet of calculations of current amount owed by Clapper.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the declarations made and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff The Fortress Law Firm, Inc. and against Defendants Rock Clapper, NGB Markets, Inc., ScanX Inc., William Scott Lawley and Richard Kaiser and the breakdown are as follows:

The plaintiff The Fortress Law Firm, Inc. recover from Defendant Rock Clapper the following:
Damages $25,662.06
Interest $11,138.06
Costs $1,153.01
Attorney's Fees $0

The plaintiff The Fortress Law Firm, Inc. recover from Defendant ScanX, Inc. the following:
Damages $22,482.14
Interest $9,755.65
Costs $1,153.01
Attorney's Fees $0

The plaintiff The Fortress Law Firm, Inc. recover from Defendants NGB Markets, Inc., William Scott Lawley and Richard Kaiser the following:
Damages $3,179.92
Interest $1,700.73
Costs $1,153.01

Counsel to submit proposed judgment to the Court for review and signature.
